prompt: A hyper-realistic, atmospheric wide shot of ancient, monolithic stone architecture. There are three distinct, isolated sets of grand staircases carved into the rock. Every individual staircase is clearly and steeply built going upward toward the sky. However, all three staircases are carved into a single, massive, fragmented tectonic slab that is dramatically and undeniably tilting downward into a dark, foggy chasm. The lighting emphasizes the contradiction: the upward steps catch the light, but the entire landmass they sit on is sliding down into shadow. No text, no numbers, highly atmospheric, cinematic composition.
visual_logic: Three distinct, ascending stone staircases built onto a massive, single tectonic slab that is dramatically sinking downward. Local structures clearly rise, while the global structure undeniably falls, creating a contradictory, uncanny spatial tension.
